Jakarta.notes: Largest Timorese diaspora in SE Asia

visa_requirements_for_timorese.notes: Timorese can visit Indonesia easily; check bilateral agreements

embassy_contact.address: Jl. Gajah Mada No. 4, Central Jakarta

return_travel.land_entry: Overland from West Timor via Atapupu/Motaain border
return_travel.sea_entry: Ferries from Kupang to Dili (13 hours)
return_travel.air_entry: Garuda, Lion Air from Jakarta/Surabaya to Dili

practical_info.language: Indonesian widely understood by Timorese diaspora
practical_info.money: Indonesian Rupiah used; USD accepted in tourism areas
practical_info.transportation: Good bus network connecting diaspora hubs

household_worker_support.remittance_options: Bank transfer, Western Union, informal networks
